summary: 46 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: user: str | None — default None, bound to NATS_USER
completion_promises.evidence: Added `user: str | None = Field(default=None, description="Username for NATS user/password authentication")` to NATSConfig. Tests verify default is None and env var NATS_USER binds correctly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: password: pydantic.SecretStr | None — default None, bound to NATS_PASSWORD
completion_promises.evidence: Added `password: SecretStr | None = Field(default=None, description="Password for NATS user/password authentication (masked in output)")` to NATSConfig. Tests verify default is None, SecretStr type, masking in repr, and env var NATS_PASSWORD binds correctly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: creds_file: str | None — default None, bound to NATS_CREDS_FILE
completion_promises.evidence: Added `creds_file: str | None = Field(default=None, description="Path to NKey credentials file for NATS authentication")` to NATSConfig. Tests verify default is None and env var NATS_CREDS_FILE binds correctly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: @model_validator(mode="after") raises ValueError when user is set without password (or vice versa)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented `auth_fields_are_consistent` model_validator that checks `has_user != has_password` and raises ValueError('user and password must be provided together'). Tests: test_user_without_password_is_rejected, test_password_without_user_is_rejected both pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: @model_validator(mode="after") raises ValueError when both password and creds_file are set
completion_promises.evidence: Same `auth_fields_are_consistent` model_validator checks `has_password and has_creds` and raises ValueError('password auth and creds_file are mutually exclusive'). Test: test_password_and_creds_file_together_is_rejected passes.

Implemented `creds_file_must_not_traverse` field_validator using `'..' in pathlib.PurePosixPath(v).parts`. Tests: test_creds_file_with_path_traversal_is_rejected, test_creds_file_with_embedded_traversal_is_rejected, test_creds_file_with_middle_traversal_is_rejected all pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All auth fields carry Field(description=...) metadata
completion_promises.evidence: All three auth fields (user, password, creds_file) have Field(description=...) metadata. Test: test_auth_fields_have_descriptions explicitly verifies each has a non-empty description. The existing test_all_fields_have_descriptions also covers these.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `ruff check src/nats_core/config.py tests/test_config.py` — 'All checks passed!'. Ran `mypy src/nats_core/config.py --strict` — 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.
